prompt: A dynamic fantasy anime illustration of a heroic elf knight girl striding forward through a massive open stone castle gate, seen from a dramatic very low angle looking up at her so she feels triumphant and larger than life. She has long flowing golden blonde hair, bright teal-green eyes, pointed elf ears, and a joyful open-mouthed smile. She raises a longsword high overhead in her right hand in a victory salute, while her left hand rests near a sheathed sword at her hip. She wears ornate polished silver plate armor with engraved details on the breastplate, pauldrons, gauntlets, and thigh-high greaves, combined with a vivid green short dress or tunic, a brown belt, and a dark green cape billowing wide behind her. Add a delicate silver tiara on her head. The setting is a sunlit medieval stone fortress entrance with 2 tall wooden gates swung open, pale stone walls, and 2 green hanging banners with pale emblem designs, one on each side. Behind her, exactly 7 small cheering townspeople in simple green outfits throw their hands up in celebration, with one waving a small green flag. White flower petals or celebratory confetti drift across the entire scene, with sparkling light particles and soft lens-like glow. Use a bright blue sky, warm sunlight, hopeful heroic mood, and energetic motion in the hair, cape, and skirt. Render in clean detailed manga-inspired fantasy art, fine linework, soft painterly shading, luminous highlights, and a polished gpt-image-2 anime illustration aesthetic.
